title: Hope
content:
Within the world of every man's desire
    Two things have power to lift the soul above:
    The first is Work, who dons a mean attire;
    The other, Love, whose raiment is of fire.
    Their child is Hope, and we the heirs thereof.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Madison Julius Cawein, titled "Hope", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
